# Toro Movers

> Family-owned bilingual moving company in Orlando, FL. Serving apartments, homes, and offices across Central Florida with upfront hourly pricing and no hidden fees.

## Services
- Apartment moving in Orlando and Central Florida
- Home moving (local and in-town)
- Office and commercial relocation
- Labor-only loading and unloading (U-Haul, PODS, rental trucks)
- Same-day and same-week moves available

## Key Facts
- Hourly pricing with 2-hour minimum - clock stops when the job ends
- No fuel surcharges, no stair fees, no elevator fees, no weekend premiums
- Bilingual crew (English and Spanish)
- Background-checked crew
- 4.9 stars on Google
- Owner-operated - no franchise hand-offs
- Phone: (689) 600-2720

## Service Area
Orlando, Kissimmee, Sanford, Altamonte Springs, Oviedo, Winter Park, Lake Mary, Clermont, Apopka, Lake Nona, Casselberry, Longwood, Maitland, Winter Garden, and 30+ Central Florida cities.

- https://toromovers.net - Homepage
- https://toromovers.net/quote - Get a quote
- https://toromovers.net/apartment-movers-orlando-fl - Apartment movers Orlando FL
